summary: Iteration 10 testing complete. All 14 backend tests passed. All 8 frontend dashboard sections verified. New features (price evolution chart and price alerts panel) are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - tests use existing data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 10 features working correctly. Price history endpoints (GET /api/price-history, GET /api/price-history/alerts, POST /api/price-history/record, POST /api/price-history/materials/record) are functional. Dashboard displays price evolution LineChart with multiple recipe lines and alerts panel. Alerts are generated when material price changes exceed threshold (default 10%). To test alerts: record material prices, change a material price, record again.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/price-history?days=90: PASS - Returns price history entries with recipe_id, recipe_name, cost_per_unit, recorded_at
backend_endpoints.GET /api/price-history/alerts: PASS - Returns price alerts array (empty when no significant changes)
backend_endpoints.POST /api/price-history/record: PASS - Records prices for all recipes (requires manager/admin)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/reports/all-costs: PASS - Returns cost data for charts

rbac_verification.operator_can_read: PASS - Operator can GET price history and alerts

frontend_dashboard_sections.stat-cards: PASS - Shows 5 stat cards (materials, recipes, overheads, suppliers, avg cost)
frontend_dashboard_sections.cost-bar-chart: PASS - Shows cost breakdown by recipe (stacked bar chart)
frontend_dashboard_sections.cost-pie-chart: PASS - Shows global cost distribution (pie chart)
frontend_dashboard_sections.price-comparison-chart: PASS - Shows prix de revient vs prix de vente (area chart)
frontend_dashboard_sections.recent-recipes: PASS - Shows latest recipes with costs
frontend_dashboard_sections.price-evolution-chart: PASS - NEW: Shows LineChart with cost evolution over 90 days, one line per recipe
frontend_dashboard_sections.price-alerts-panel: PASS - NEW: Shows material price alerts with direction arrows and percentage badges

price_evolution_chart_details.grouping: By date, one line per recipe
price_evolution_chart_details.tooltip: Shows date and cost per unit in EUR
price_evolution_chart_details.legend: Shows recipe names with colored indicators

price_alerts_panel_details.alert_types: hausse (increase) with ArrowUp, baisse (decrease) with ArrowDown
price_alerts_panel_details.display: Material name, old price, new price, percentage change
